name: Feature Request

labels: enhancement

---

## Feature Description

A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see.

## Problem Statement

Describe the problem this feature would solve. Example: "As a [role], I need to [action] so that [benefit]."

Which roles would use this feature?

- [ ] SUPER_ADMIN

```
POST /api/v1/...
GET  /api/v1/...
PUT  /api/v1/...
```

## Database Changes (if applicable)

Describe any new tables, columns, or migrations needed.

## Event Changes (if applicable)

Describe any new RabbitMQ events or changes to existing events.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Criterion 1
- [ ] Criterion 2
- [ ] Criterion 3

## Regulatory Considerations

Does this feature have implications for any of the following?

- [ ] HIPAA (PHI protection)
- [ ] GDPR (consent, data erasure)
- [ ] FDA 21 CFR Part 11 (electronic signatures, audit trail)
- [ ] AABB Standards (traceability)
- [ ] WHO Guidelines (blood safety)
- [ ] None

If applicable, add mockups or wireframes.

Add any other context about the feature request here.
